title: nigellastrum corniculatum
intro: Nigellastrum corniculatum, also known as the "lesser calthorpe", is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Nigellastrum corniculatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
